sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتِ الْمَجْمُوعَةُ إِلَى مَطْعَمٍ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Grupa je otišla u restoran u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: The group went to a restaurant in the city center.

sentences.translation: Naručili su lokalna jela i pili sok.
sentences.translationEn: They ordered local food and drank juice.

sentences.translation: Hrana je bila ukusna a cijena prikladna.
sentences.translationEn: The food was delicious and the price was reasonable.

sentences.translation: Platili su račun i izašli zadovoljni.
sentences.translationEn: They paid the bill and left satisfied.
